projects.title: Gallery 01
projects.subtitle: AI / 3D
projects.description: A visual exploration of form and motion. This project combines real-time graphics with tactile interfaces, built using Three.js and WebGL. The color palette draws from natural tones while the interaction model emphasizes direct manipulation and fluid feedback.
